Task instructions and export_result.sh which analyzes DBF for POP_EST > 100000000.

privileged_info_summary: The source data is the real public domain Natural Earth 110m cultural countries dataset. Direct programmatic analysis of the source DBF file reveals exactly 14 countries have a 'POP_EST' value strictly greater than 100,000,000. The target exported shapefile path is /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/populous_countries.shp. The expected feature count is configured between 10 and 18 features.
